title: leea macrophylla
intro: Leea macrophylla, also known as the tree of heaven or elephant ear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Leeaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leeae macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
